title: Jaeger vs Evas
wikitext:
[]: Jaeger vs Evas             Quote Post by LairenyX » Tue Jun 25, 2013 3:01 am As you know... the movie "Pacific Rim" is coming out and... i NEED to know which is the better weapon for humanity...in the follow category: 1) To fight against giant monsters 2) Aesthetic 3) Against the other group (Jaeger vs Evas) Basically, I just want to know which looks better, is more powerful, and more effective against the enemy. If giant monsters were to invade us in real time and we can only pick between these two weapons, which would the world goverments pick? Thx. P.S: For the aesthetic part, please post as many near CGI or best picture of Evas as you can.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Jun 25, 2013 4:57 am As far as I know Jaegers aren't pseudo-gods and going by footage I've seen they're much slower, clumsier tin cans. Plus they don't have AT Field either so this fight is over before it even began.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Jun 25, 2013 5:13 am Well maybe the Jaeger have a chance... against provisional Unit-05.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Tue Jun 25, 2013 6:49 am ElMariachi wrote: Well maybe the Jaeger have a chance... against provisional Unit-05.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Jun 25, 2013 7:09 am Makes you imagine what the definitive Unit-05 was supposed to be! By the way did we know the height of a Jaeger, or at least an approximation?

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Jun 25, 2013 7:56 am Jeagers are apparently 280 feet tall= 85 meters, so they are 5 meters larger than Rebuilt of Evangelion Eva's. [url]http://www.pacificrimmovie.net/news/tv-spot-shows-footage/pacific-rim-movie-jaeger-blueprint-height-comparison/[/url] If this is legit.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Jun 25, 2013 8:10 am Ok soooo... basically Jeager vs EVA is like Jet Alone vs EVA right? That should respond to the OP question!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Jun 25, 2013 1:19 pm Jaeger loses. No ATF, clumsy, and lacks mobility.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Jun 25, 2013 1:36 pm Finally looked at the trailer, the Jaeger look really clunky.

[]:             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Tue Jun 25, 2013 2:41 pm We cannot really properly judge this until the movie comes out. Trailers can't possibly give an accurate assessment of what a Jaeger can do. Even the website's details have nothing to really measure against an Eva until they are seen in action. My gut instinct however, is that the Jaegers would lose. AT field rules the school.

[]:             Quote Post by Ænimal » Tue Jun 25, 2013 6:14 pm setting mechanics, different universes, and my overall hatred for this movie aside, the EVA wins based solely on one principle: AT Field.

[]:             Quote Post by LairenyX » Tue Jun 25, 2013 8:33 pm Ok, thx for the respond so far guys. It seems like from your thoughts, Evas are better because it has more agility and have superior defensive mechanism, some kind of ATF shield.

[]:             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Tue Jun 25, 2013 8:43 pm LairenyX wrote: some kind of ATF shield.

[]:             Quote Post by Ænimal » Tue Jun 25, 2013 9:20 pm Jurrasic wrote: ..... ...... ..... I take it you are not a fan of/familiar with the series then?

[]:             Quote Post by LairenyX » Tue Jun 25, 2013 10:26 pm Jurrasic wrote: ..... ...... ..... I take it you are not a fan of/familiar with the series then?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Tue Jun 25, 2013 10:46 pm Well, basically the "AT Field" is an impenetrable barrier. Nothing can destroy it (we see it getting hit by gun turrets, missiles, rocket launchers, in some cases even a N2 bomb, without ever breaking) other than another AT Field. So the Evas are basically invincible against anything except other Evas or the Angels from NGE.

[]: Re: Jaeger vs Evas             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Jun 25, 2013 11:56 pm LairenyX wrote: As you know... the movie "Pacific Rim" is coming out and... i NEED to know which is the better weapon for humanity...in the follow category: 1) To fight against giant monsters 2) Aesthetic 3) Against the other group (Jaeger vs Evas) Basically, I just want to know which looks better, is more powerful, and more effective against the enemy. If giant monsters were to invade us in real time and we can only pick between these two weapons, which would the world goverments pick? Thx. P.S: For the aesthetic part, please post as many near CGI or best picture of Evas as you can.

[]: Re: Jaeger vs Evas             Quote Post by LairenyX » Wed Jun 26, 2013 12:00 am KnightmareX13 wrote: Avast! Ye be setting yer sails with no wind lad. Ye be best waiting to the 12th till ye be making bets. what be that Positron cannon then? That thar blew holes clean through the AT field and the angel.

[]: Re: Jaeger vs Evas             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 12:25 am KnightmareX13 wrote: what be that Positron cannon then? That thar blew holes clean through the AT field and the angel.

[]:             Quote Post by LairenyX » Wed Jun 26, 2013 12:35 am Is it true that Evas can climb up the side of a sky scraper? like kind of the way Spider Man does it?
